clEntries.5.11.109: v5.11.108: Integrated JohanBendz SDK3 improvements, adding LELLKI fingerprint and rain sensor data points., Resolved issues related to device pairing and scanning., Added 8 new device fingerprints: [_TZ3000_402vrq2i, _TZE200_rxq4iti9]., Updated ., Automated integration with Johan SDK3 for improved development .

clEntries.5.11.107: Added support for new rain sensor device and improved fingerprint scanning with JohanBendz SDK3.
clEntries.5.11.106: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.106 adds new device fingerprints and updates diagnostics.

clEntries.5.11.104: Added support for Zigbee sub-device control via Tuya gateway and updated drivers and fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.103: Added local control for Tuya WiFi devices with SmartLife QR authentication and UDP discovery.
